name: Weinberg Angle (tree level)
R_rules: DOF counting: each degree of freedom has equal weight (L1)
R_roles: Gauge DOF = 3 (SU(2) generators mixing with U(1)). Metric DOF = 10 (symmetric tensor in 3+1D).
E_elements: Nested distinction [2, 3, 1] at three depths. Depth 0: binary (SU(2)). Depth 1: ternary (SU(3)). Depth 2: reflexive (U(1)).
